---
title: "Sabrina Chow"
subtitle: "Undergraduate, Computational Biology"
image: /images/portraits/sabrina-chow.jpg
role: undergrad
weight: 9
aliases: ["Sabrina Chow", "S. Chow", "S Chow"]
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:sabrina8chow@gmail.com"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/sabrinachow8"
    - icon: globe
      text: Website
      href: "https://sabrinachow8.github.io/sabrinachow8/index.html"
---

Leaf lifespan, ecology, conservation.
